_notes: Fill this out per client. Run: node build.js to generate index.html. Leave any optional field blank or null.

practice.name: Paradise Valley Family Dental
practice.tagline: Where Phoenix Families Come to Smile
practice.about: Paradise Valley Family Dental has proudly served the Phoenix community for over 20 years. Drs. Elrod, Provenzale, and Klein provide comprehensive care in a warm, welcoming environment — from routine cleanings to advanced restorative treatments.

doctors.name: Dr. Gina M. Elrod
doctors.bio: Dr. Elrod has over 20 years of experience providing comprehensive family dental care. A Phoenix native, she is committed to building lasting relationships with her patients through gentle, personalized treatment.

doctors.name: Dr. Donald Provenzale, Jr.
doctors.bio: Dr. Provenzale brings a meticulous approach to every procedure, with a focus on patient comfort and long-term oral health outcomes.

doctors.name: Dr. Emmanuel Klein
doctors.bio: Dr. Klein is dedicated to staying at the forefront of dental technology, offering patients the latest in digital imaging, same-day crowns, and minimally invasive techniques.

services.name: General Checkups & Cleanings
services.description: Comprehensive exams and professional cleanings to keep your smile healthy and catch issues early.

services.name: Dental Implants
services.description: Permanent tooth replacement that looks, feels, and functions like your natural teeth.

services.name: Teeth Whitening
services.description: Professional-grade whitening treatments that deliver dramatically brighter results safely and quickly.

services.name: Invisalign & Clear Aligners
services.description: Straighten your smile discreetly with custom clear aligners — no metal wires or brackets.

services.name: Crowns & Bridges
services.description: Custom-crafted restorations that protect damaged teeth and replace missing ones with precision.

services.name: Emergency Dentistry
services.description: Same-day appointments for dental emergencies — cracked teeth, knocked-out teeth, severe pain.

testimonials.text: I've been coming to Paradise Valley Family Dental for 12 years. Dr. Elrod is the best dentist I've ever had. My whole family loves this practice.
testimonials.author: Karen M.

testimonials.text: My kids actually look forward to going to the dentist. The team here is so warm and patient with children. I can't recommend them enough.
testimonials.author: David R.

testimonials.text: Got my implants done here — painless procedure, beautiful result. Dr. Provenzale walked me through every step. Couldn't be happier.
testimonials.author: Sandra L.

tawkto._note: Get these from tawk.to dashboard → Administration → Chat Widget. Leave null to use built-in placeholder widget.

meta.page_title: Paradise Valley Family Dental | Phoenix, AZ
meta.description: Family dentistry in Phoenix, AZ. Serving the community for 20+ years with gentle, comprehensive care for all ages.
